# c4tts tests. Plain executables registered with CTest (no external test
# framework, keeping the build self-contained per the ds4 philosophy).

find_program(PYTHON_EXECUTABLE NAMES python3 python REQUIRED)

# Fixtures generated by NumPy at build time, consumed by the C++ npy test to
# prove cross-language compatibility.
set(FIXTURE_DIR ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/fixtures)
add_custom_command(
  OUTPUT ${FIXTURE_DIR}/mat_f32.npy
  COMMAND ${PYTHON_EXECUTABLE}
          ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../tools/gen_test_fixtures.py
          ${FIXTURE_DIR}
  DEPENDS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../tools/gen_test_fixtures.py
  COMMENT "Generating npy test fixtures")
add_custom_target(c4tts_fixtures DEPENDS ${FIXTURE_DIR}/mat_f32.npy)

function(c4tts_add_test name)
  add_executable(${name} ${name}.cpp)
  add_dependencies(${name} c4tts_fixtures)
  target_link_libraries(${name} PRIVATE c4tts_core)
  target_compile_definitions(${name} PRIVATE C4TTS_FIXTURE_DIR="${FIXTURE_DIR}")
  add_test(NAME ${name} COMMAND ${name})
endfunction()

c4tts_add_test(test_npy)
